title: Fail closed on insufficient evidence
description: Absence, stale compatibility, incomplete pagination, snapshot mismatch, invalid category history, undefined calculation, or an unmet sufficiency rule returns an explicit unavailable or insufficient-evidence state; INSIGHTS never fabricates zero, confidence, or a baseline. A coherence, compatibility, integrity, or exact-arithmetic failure returns no Insight Report. Metric-local insufficient evidence yields a complete report that accounts for the metric with its named state while preserving other supported exact metrics and signals.
